about.text:
Creating, programming and designing are a few of the things that make programming and the world of technology in general very interesting to me. I have recently started programming, and today I have acquired a lot of knowledge about this world. Even so, I know that I still have a lot to learn.

As hobbies, apart of programming, I really enjoy watching series, listening to music from several styles and also playing videogames.

skills.tech-2: Web - HTML, CSS, Javascript/Typescript, React (NextJS), Angular and Django
skills.tech-4: SAP Business One - VB.NET and C#
skills.personal-1: Easy and rapid learning of programming languages
skills.personal-4: Teamwork and good relation with partners

projects.description-1:
Entertaining Media is a website where you can search all kind of contents to watch, read or play. Its slogan is "What's your next thing to fight against boredom?", because in here you can find everything to get entertained in different ways. All the contents shown in this page are fetched from different APIs, such as TMDB (for movies), IGDB (for games) and Google Books API.

The whole project is made in the current lastest version of NextJS (v.14) for routing and server side rendering in most of the React components.
projects.description-2:
This application is about a web page where you can write notes and organize them in your own way.

The project is divided into two parts: The 'front-end' part is done with React with Typescript, and the 'back-end' part is done with Django (this one manages requests for the MySQL database).
projects.description-3:
This is a simple Android application designed for listening to music or watching preselected video clips.

The code is written in Java and what it does is displaying a dynamic and personalized list, and reproducing the audios or videos.

In this project, you can make some improvements such as fetching songs from the internet instead of having them downloaded
projects.more: Look at other projects in my GitHub!
